zh.Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands: 荷蘭奧維利瑟爾代文特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto van Arkel於1330年出生在荷蘭時，他的父親Jan IV van Arkel26歲，母親Irmgard von Kleve23歲。他於1360年10月18日與Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont在荷蘭奧維利瑟爾代文特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年3月26日在荷蘭霍蘭格利姆享年66歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆。

zh-hans.Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands: 荷兰奧維利瑟爾代文特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto van Arkel于1330年出生在荷兰时，他的父亲Jan IV van Arkel26岁，母亲Irmgard von Kleve23岁。他于1360年10月18日与Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont在荷兰奧維利瑟爾代文特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年3月26日在荷兰霍蘭格利姆享年66岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆。

historicEvents.description: Otto van Arkel granted the already walled place town charter in 1382.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto van Arkel was born in 1330, in Netherlands, his father, Jan IV van Arkel, was 26 and his mother, Irmgard von Kleve, was 23. He married Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont on 18 October 1360, in Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 March 1396, in Gorinchem, Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 66, and was buried in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto van Arkel est né en 1330, à Pays-Bas, son père, Jan IV van Arkel, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Irmgard von Kleve, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont le 18 octobre 1360, à Deventer, Overijssel, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1396, à Gorinchem, Holland, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto van Arkel 1330 in Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan IV van Arkel 26 und seine Mutter Irmgard von Kleve 23. Er hat am 18. Oktober 1360 in Deventer, Oberyssel, Niederlande Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. März 1396 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Gorinchem, Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto van Arkel è nato il nel 1330 nel Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan IV van Arkel, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Irmgard von Kleve, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont il 18 ottobre 1360, nel Deventer, Overijssel, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 marzo 1396, nel Gorinchem, Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケム
ja.lifeSummary: Otto van Arkelが1330年にオランダで生まれた時，父Jan IV van Arkelは26歳，母Irmgard von Kleveは23歳であった。1360年10月18日にオランダオバーイジセルデベンターでElisabeth de Bar-Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年3月26日にオランダホーランドゴリンケムで66歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto van Arkel(이)가 1330년 네덜란드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan IV van Arkel(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmgard von Kleve(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1360년 10월 18일 네덜란드 버리j셀 데븐터에서 Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 3월 26일 네덜란드 홀랜드 고린체에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto van Arkel nasceu em 1330, em Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan IV van Arkel, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard von Kleve, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont em 18 de outubro de 1360, em Deventer, Overijssel, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1396, em Gorinchem, Holland, Países Baixos, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto van Arkel родился в 1330 г. в местности Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan IV van Arkel было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmgard von Kleve, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont 18 октября 1360 г. в местности дивентир, овириджссел, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 марта 1396 г. в местности горинчем, холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

mai le 1360 e o'o I le 1396

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto van Arkel nació en 1330, en Países Bajos, su papá, Jan IV van Arkel, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Irmgard von Kleve, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de Bar-Pierrepont el 18 de octubre de 1360, en Deventer, Overijssel, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1396, en Gorinchem, Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
